record.field:
# ── LabelCast Print Action ───────────────────────────────────────────── # Renders the configured report as PDF and sends it to the LabelCast # agent running on your local network. # # To customise: change the report_name variable below, or update the # labelcast.report.name system parameter. # ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
import base64 import json import urllib.request import urllib.error
# ── Read configuration from system parameters ────────────────────────── get_param = env['ir.config_parameter'].sudo().get_param
agent_url = get_param('labelcast.agent.url', 'http://localhost:7777') api_token = get_param('labelcast.api.token', '') report_xml = get_param('labelcast.report.name', 'stock.report_picking') copies = int(get_param('labelcast.copies', '1'))
# ── Collect record IDs (works from list view multi-select too) ───────── if hasattr(records, '__iter__'): record_ids = records.ids else: record_ids = [record.id]
if not record_ids: raise UserError("No records selected to print.")
errors = []
for rec_id in record_ids: try: # ── Render report to PDF bytes ────────────────────────────────── report = env['ir.actions.report'] pdf_bytes, _ = report._render_qweb_pdf(report_xml, [rec_id])
# ── Build the record label name ───────────────────────────────── rec = env[records._name].browse(rec_id) label_name = getattr(rec, 'name', str(rec_id)) or str(rec_id)
# ── Encode PDF to base64 ──────────────────────────────────────── pdf_b64 = base64.b64encode(pdf_bytes).decode('utf-8')
# ── Build JSON payload ────────────────────────────────────────── payload = json.dumps({ 'pdf': pdf_b64, 'copies': copies, 'label': label_name, }).encode('utf-8')
# ── Send HTTP POST to LabelCast agent ─────────────────────────── req = urllib.request.Request( url = agent_url.rstrip('/') + '/print', data = payload, method = 'POST', headers = { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Print-Token': api_token, 'Accept': 'application/json', }, )
try: with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15) as resp: result = json.loads(resp.read().decode('utf-8')) job_id = result.get('jobId', 'unknown') # Successful — log it env['ir.logging'].sudo().create({ 'name': 'LabelCast', 'type': 'client', 'level': 'INFO', 'message': f'Print job queued: {label_name} → jobId={job_id}', 'path': 'labelcast', 'func': 'print_action', 'line': '0', 'dbname': env.cr.dbname, })
except urllib.error.HTTPError as e: body = e.read().decode('utf-8', errors='replace') errors.append(f"{label_name}: HTTP {e.code} — {body}")
except urllib.error.URLError as e: errors.append( f"{label_name}: Could not reach LabelCast agent at {agent_url}. " f"Is it running? ({e.reason})" )
except Exception as e: errors.append(f"Record {rec_id}: {str(e)}")
# ── Surface any errors to the user ───────────────────────────────────── if errors: raise UserError( "LabelCast — some jobs failed:\n\n" + "\n".join(errors) )
